entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A multi-purpose legume serving millions of farmers and their value chain actors globally.

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC TRAITS
entities.description: Observable characteristics used to determine genetic variation among groundnut collections.

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat markers used to determine genetic variation and population structure.

entities.name: RUST RESISTANCE
entities.description: A trait targeted for improvement through breeding in groundnut.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The extent of genetic variation within groundnut accessions.

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The distribution of genetic variation among groundnut accessions.

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A region where groundnut is grown and low yields are observed.

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: A country in sub-Saharan Africa where groundnut is grown.

entities.name: LOW YIELDS
entities.description: Poor productivity of groundnut cultivars in sub-Saharan Africa.

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of selecting distinct and complementary genotypes to improve crop traits.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The difference in genetic makeup among diverse groundnut collections.
